overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a mountain path at night. The character travels from a stone-walled section through open mountain vistas toward snow-capped peaks under a cloudy night sky, with cinematic game engine rendering.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path beside a stone wall, heading toward distant mountains

entered.detail: rough stone wall running parallel to the path on the right side
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
dense pine trees lining the left side of the path
dark cloudy night sky with blue moonlight filtering through

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path at night, bordered by a stone wall on the right and pine forest on the left. The scene is dimly lit with cool blue moonlight, and distant mountains are barely visible through the trees ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain trail with panoramic vista

events.description: exits the walled section as the stone wall ends and view opens to reveal snow-capped mountains ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain opens up, revealing a dramatic mountain vista ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts replacing the stone wall along the path
large snow-covered mountain peak dominating the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as the stone wall gives way to a wooden fence, revealing a breathtaking view of snow-capped mountains in the distance. The terrain becomes more open with scattered trees, and the night sky is fully visible above the peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain approach with rocky outcrops

events.description: entering denser forest section with rocky terrain and fallen logs on the path sides

agents.ego_description: walking through denser forest toward the mountain peaks, navigating around rocky outcrops

entered.detail: large boulders and rocky outcrops lining the right side of the path
decayed wooden logs and stumps scattered along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The path enters a denser forested area with rocky outcrops and fallen logs lining the trail. The snow-capped mountains loom larger and closer ahead, partially obscured by pine trees, as the character continues the steady climb toward the peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from a confined, dimly lit path into an expansive vista of snow-capped peaks. It begins with Geralt walking a narrow dirt path bordered by a stone wall and a dense pine forest under cool blue moonlight. As the stone wall gives way to a wooden fence, the terrain opens up to reveal a breathtaking view of distant, illuminated mountains beneath a wide night sky. The scene then shifts back into a denser forested area filled with rocky outcrops and fallen logs, where the snow-capped peaks loom larger and closer through the trees as the climb continues.
